positive: A vibrant, high-energy Pop Art illustration of a dancing group of stylized animals (fox, owl, raccoon), rendered in the style of Roy Lichtenstein and comic book Ben-Day dots, bold outlines, primary colors, halftone pattern.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, soft shading, watercolor, realism, muted palette
